1: Even Even to such as are of a clean heart.
2: My steps had well nigh slipped.
3: When When I saw the prosperity of the wicked.
4: But their strength is is firm.
5: Neither are they plagued like other other men.
6: Violence covereth them as as a garment.
7: They have more than heart could wish.
9: And their tongue walketh through the earth.
10: And waters of a full cup cup are wrung out to them.
11: And is there knowledge in the most High?
12: Behold, these are are the ungodly, who prosper in the world; they increase in in riches.
13: Verily I have cleansed my heart in in vain, and washed my hands in innocency.
15: Behold, I should offend against against the generation of thy children.
16: It was was too painful for me;
17: Then Then understood I their end.
18: Thou castedst them down into destruction.
19: They are utterly consumed with terrors.
20: So So , O Lord, when thou awakest, thou shalt despise their image.
21: And I was pricked in my reins.
22: I was as as a beast before thee.
23: Thou hast holden me me by my right hand.
24: And afterward receive me to to glory.
25: And there is there is none upon earth that that I desire beside thee.
26: But But God is is the strength of my heart, and my portion for ever.
27: Thou hast destroyed all them that go a whoring from thee.
28: That I may declare all thy works.
